steps.title: Estimate two trend points
steps.content: A line of best fit should pass through the middle of the data cloud, not every point. Two reasonable trend points from the scatterplot are about $(1{,}200)$ and $(2.5{,}350)$.

steps.title: Estimate the line
steps.content:
Use the two points to estimate the slope.
$$m=\frac{350-200}{2.5-1}$$
$$m=\frac{150}{1.5}$$
$$m=100$$
Using $(1{,}200)$ gives an intercept of about $100$, so the model should be close to $y=100x+100$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the candidate lines shows that the line with slope $100$ and intercept $100$ runs through the center of the scatterplot. The answer is B.
